name: site-alert
title: Site alert
description: Persistent, page-level band for sitewide emergencies or important service notices at the top of every page. Region landmark with a configurable label, info and emergency variants with an icon for non-color redundancy, optional heading, slim layout, and opt-in live-region semantics for dynamically injected emergencies.
useWhen: Publishing a sitewide emergency notice at the top of every page
Announcing an important service disruption across the whole site (e.g. a boil-water notice or system outage)
Keeping a persistent, page-level notice visible on page load as a named region landmark
Injecting an emergency band into an already-loaded page (set the live prop so it is announced)
avoidWhen: Reporting the status of one form field (use the Field error slot)
A contextual callout inside page content (use Alert)
A blocking decision that needs a response (use a dialog)
Transient notifications that disappear on their own (use a toast)

keyboard: The band is static content and never takes focus
Screen-reader users can navigate to it as a region landmark named by the label prop
Any links inside follow the native anchor keyboard contract and are always underlined
With live set, role=status (polite) or role=alert (assertive) is announced without any keyboard interaction
